topic: Every recipe in my grandmother's recipe box has been altered since I started using them
title: Every Recipe in My Grandmother's Recipe Box Has Been Altered Since I Started Using Them | True Scary Story

scenes.narration: Every recipe in my grandmother's recipe box has been altered since I started using them.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of an old tin recipe box on a kitchen counter with handwritten index cards visible inside, dim warm lamp light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Index cards. Tin box. Handwritten. Forty years of recipes.
scenes.image_prompt: close detail of a single handwritten recipe card in faded blue ink, the corners worn with age, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I cook from it twice a week.
scenes.image_prompt: wide interior of a small kitchen with the recipe box open beside a mixing bowl on the counter, dim afternoon light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Pulled her meatloaf recipe in October. Salt was different.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a handwritten recipe card with the ingredient list visible, a finger pointing at the salt measurement, only the hand visible, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Asked my mother. She remembered the original measurement.
scenes.image_prompt: close detail of a phone screen showing an outgoing call to a contact labeled MOM, dim ambient light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: The card said three teaspoons. She remembered one and a half. Same handwriting.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of two handwritten ingredient lines side by side with different teaspoon measurements written in the same hand, vertical 9:16 framing
close detail of a stack of recipe cards being photographed one by one on a kitchen counter, dim overhead light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Each week one recipe changes. Always more salt. Always one more teaspoon.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a laptop screen showing two photographed cards side by side with the salt measurements visibly different, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: The card edges look the same. The ink looks the same. The numbers are different.
scenes.image_prompt: close detail of two photographs of the same recipe card with one specific number circled in red marker, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Last week the meatloaf card called for nine teaspoons of salt. I made it. Could not eat it.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a baked meatloaf on a kitchen plate with a single fork resting on the side, untouched, dim warm light, vertical 9:16 framing
wide shot of a closed tin recipe box on a kitchen shelf beside cookbooks, dim ambient light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Every recipe is still being altered. I check weekly. The salt keeps climbing.
scenes.image_prompt: close detail of a recipe card with a single ingredient number visibly higher than in a previous photograph, dim ambient light, vertical 9:16 framing
